ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "addr" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine (e.g., american, french) */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the restaurant (e.g., 0, 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the restaurant */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's website */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the restaurant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the restaurant (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, reviewer, guest) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the rating was marked as helpful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menus" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant offering the menu item */,
  "menu_item" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image for the menu item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the menu item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the menu item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menus_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_categories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., appetizers, entrees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_categories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_item_categories_menu_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_item_id") REFERENCES menus ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_item_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES menu_categories ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_text" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location used in the search query */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Cuisine type used in the search query */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended restaurant */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., cuisine, location) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., italian, new york) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., american, french) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_versions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the versioned data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_versions_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, reviewer, guest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
